assumptions: The developer has a supported browser and can receive email when the selected route requires it.
No platform account, tenant, credentials, or product resources exist yet.
Developer has internet access and a web browser
Developer can receive email for account verification

developer_goal: Sign up for a MessageBird account and send a first message via the API.

first_success.outcome: Successfully send a message through the MessageBird API resulting in message delivery initiation.
first_success.observable_signal: API response confirms message accepted; message appears in MessageBird Dashboard logs.

route_selection.rule: Reconstruct complete official candidate routes, prefer no payment/admin/approval when possible, then minimize required actions; leave consequential ties unresolved.

candidates.name: WhatsApp Business onboarding via MessageBird
candidates.reason: Present in the machine draft; not selected by an independent shortest-path audit.

candidates.name: Bird CLI and SDKs
candidates.reason: While Bird CLI and SDKs are official interfaces, the primary documented onboarding path starts with the Dashboard and REST API usage.

prerequisites.description: Create a free MessageBird account and verify email.
Generate an API access key (live or test) from the MessageBird Dashboard.
Have sufficient test credits or top-up balance to send messages to numbers other than your own.
Have a verified phone number or purchase a virtual mobile number from MessageBird.

external_gates.description: Must create and verify a MessageBird account via email confirmation.
Must create an API access key in the Dashboard to authenticate API requests.
Must have test credits or top-up balance to send messages beyond own verified number.
Must have a verified phone number or purchase a virtual mobile number to send messages.
For WhatsApp Business onboarding, Facebook Business verification is required.
WhatsApp Business application approval by WhatsApp is required before channel activation.
WhatsApp channel activation requires entering a verification code sent to the phone number.

platform_outcomes.description: Send your first message using the MessageBird API with a valid API key and a verified phone number or virtual mobile number.

sources.title: MessageBird | Tutorials Getting Started
evidence_supported: Claim free test credits & API Key

uncertainties.question: Is there an officially documented time estimate for the WhatsApp Business onboarding process?
uncertainties.impact: Without this, time-to-first-success for WhatsApp onboarding cannot be precisely stated.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: The documentation provides detailed steps but does not specify expected duration.

uncertainties.question: Are there any additional mandatory configuration steps after sending the first message for general API usage?
uncertainties.impact: Could affect the definition of first success boundary and onboarding completeness.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Documentation focuses on first message send but does not explicitly state if further steps are required immediately.

uncertainties.question: Has the machine-drafted MessageBird route been independently shortest-path audited?
uncertainties.impact: Action counts and peer comparison must stay withheld until a human audit passes.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Complete a shortest-path audit against current official docs and mark verified only when evidence supports it.
